rag_rules: Place input assumptions and output guarantees in component type annexes when concrete bounds or visible relations are available
Use visible feature names for ports and data types in AGREE contracts
Avoid implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope
generic_rules: Use named constants or visible relations for concrete bounds in assumptions and guarantees
Relate visible outputs to visible inputs in output dependency contracts
Align helper declaration types with expression types in AGREE contracts
Avoid encoding AADL property associations as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks for AGREE contracts
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes
Use implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings
Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not encode AADL property associations as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers for range comparisons
Do not use AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions without explicit exposure
